languages.text: На военном совете ни одна из сторон не сможет склонить чашу весов без вмешательства Вольного Торговца. Лария предлагает положиться на союзников и держать оборону.

traits.locale_text: На военном совете ни одна из сторон не сможет склонить чашу весов без вмешательства Вольного Торговца. Лария предлагает положиться на союзников и держать оборону.

languages.text: During the war council, neither side can tip the scales without the Rogue Trader's intervention. Laria proposes trusting in their allies and maintaining the defence.
languages.original_text: На военном совете ни одна из сторон не сможет склонить чашу весов без вмешательства Вольного Торговца. Лария предлагает положиться на союзников и держать оборону.

traits.locale_text: During the war council, neither side can tip the scales without the Rogue Trader's intervention. Laria proposes trusting in their allies and holding the defence.
During the war council, neither side can tip the scales without the Rogue Trader's intervention. Laria proposes trusting in their allies and holding the defence.
During the war council, neither side can tip the scales without the Rogue Trader's intervention. Laria proposes trusting in their allies and maintaining the defence.
During the war council, neither side can tip the scales without the Rogue Trader's intervention. Laria proposes trusting in their allies and maintaining the defence.

languages.text: Während des Kriegsrates kann keine Seite ohne die Intervention {mf|des Freihändlers|der Freihändlerin} das Blatt zu ihren Gunsten wenden. Laria schlägt vor, den Verbündeten zu vertrauen und die Verteidigung aufrecht zu erhalten.
languages.original_text: During the war council, neither side can tip the scales without the Rogue Trader's intervention. Laria proposes trusting in their allies and maintaining the defence.

traits.locale_text: Während des Kriegsrates kann keine Seite ohne die Intervention {mf|des Freihändlers|der Freihändlerin} das Blatt zu ihren Gunsten wenden. Laria schlägt vor, den Verbündeten zu vertrauen und die Verteidigung aufrecht zu erhalten.

languages.text: Pendant le conseil de guerre, aucun camp ne peut gagner sans l'intervention {mf|du libre-marchand|de la libre-marchande}. Laria propose de faire confiance à leurs alliés et de poursuivre la défense.
languages.original_text: During the war council, neither side can tip the scales without the Rogue Trader's intervention. Laria proposes trusting in their allies and maintaining the defence.

traits.locale_text: Pendant le conseil de guerre, aucun camp ne peut gagner sans l'intervention {mf|du libre-marchand|de la libre-marchande}. Laria propose de faire confiance à leurs alliés et de poursuivre la défense.

languages.text: 在军事议会上，如果没有行商浪人的介入，任何一方都无法真正占据上风。菈丽雅提议信任盟友，继续坚守防线。
languages.original_text: During the war council, neither side can tip the scales without the Rogue Trader's intervention. Laria proposes trusting in their allies and maintaining the defence.

traits.locale_text: 在军事议会上，如果没有行商浪人的介入，任何一方都无法真正占据上风。菈丽雅提议信任盟友，继续坚守防线。

languages.text: Ninguno de los bandos implicados en el consejo de guerra pueden inclinar la balanza en su favor sin la intervención {mf|del|de la} Comerciante Independiente. Laria propone confiar en sus aliados y mantener la defensa.
languages.original_text: During the war council, neither side can tip the scales without the Rogue Trader's intervention. Laria proposes trusting in their allies and maintaining the defence.

traits.locale_text: Ninguno de los bandos implicados en el consejo de guerra pueden inclinar la balanza en su favor sin la intervención {mf|del|de la} Comerciante Independiente. Laria propone confiar en sus aliados y mantener la defensa.

languages.text: 戦争評議会では、自由商人の介入なしには両陣営とも天秤を傾けることはできない。ラリアは同盟国に頼り、防衛を堅持することを提案する。
languages.original_text: At the war council, neither side can tip the scales without the intervention of the Free Merchant. Laria suggests relying on allies and holding the defences.

languages.text: Savaş konseyi sırasında Hür Tacir müdahale etmeden hiçbir taraf dengeyi değiştiremez. Laria, müttefiklerine güvenmeyi ve savunmayı sürdürmeyi öneriyor.
languages.original_text: During the war council, neither side can tip the scales without the Rogue Trader's intervention. Laria proposes trusting in their allies and maintaining the defence.

traits.locale_text: Savaş konseyi sırasında Hür Tacir müdahale etmeden hiçbir taraf dengeyi değiştiremez. Laria, müttefiklerine güvenmeyi ve savunmayı sürdürmeyi öneriyor.
